name: Harvey's Sawmill Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the hot sausage patties in a saucepan until heated through, then drain and keep warm.
2. In the same pan, pour off all but two tablespoons of grease.
3. Gradually add the flour to the pan, stirring constantly, until it reaches a yellow-gold color.
4. Slowly incorporate the milk (or water), mixing well after each addition.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and then reduce heat to allow it to simmer.
6. Crumble the sausage patties and stir them into the gravy along with the salt and pepper.
7. Simmer for two minutes over low heat.
8. Serve the gravy over hot open-faced biscuits.
